headline: Rockwell Automation (ROK) Earnings Expected to Grow: What to Know Ahead of Next Week's Release
summary: Rockwell Automation (ROK) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

headline: 5 Stocks to Buy With Extensive Robotics Applications for 2026
summary: ADSK, ISRG, ROK, NDSN and TER are five robotics-focused stocks for 2026, leveraging AI-driven tools to boost productivity and recurring revenue streams.
